chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Ist Appeal No.13 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1651/2020 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 23.10.2023 None present for the Appellant. M/s Muhammad Mushtaq Qadri, Muhammad Awais Malano and Naveed Ahmed Bughio, Advocates for Respondent No.1. Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. As against the judgment and decree passed on a summary proceedings/negotiable instrument, the suit was decreed and an Appeal was preferred by the Appellant. On 31.03.2021, without prejudice to the merits of the case, 50% of the decretal amount was ordered to be deposited with the Nazir of this Court as security. The Appellant failed in the said attempt to secure the amount. Appellant yet again sought an extension in time to make compliance of the order referred above, which again was granted as a last chance, yet the compliance has not been made. On the last date Appellant and his counsel were called absent and a brief was held by an Advocate. Today no one is in attendance on behalf of the Appellant, even no intimation. The instant Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
